title: ajuga bracteosa var. crenata
intro: Ajuga bracteosa var. crenata is a variety of Ajuga bracteosa, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as bugle or Ajuga. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ajuga bracteosa var. crenata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and improve digestion. Ajuga bracteosa var. crenata can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
